name: arbiter-forge
description: Forge deterministic multimodel implementation, documentation, and blind-check orchestration tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Build multimodel arbiter tasks with auditable gates.
interface.longDescription: Arbiter Forge turns a normalized objective into a deterministic, self-contained orchestration prompt with role-oriented model/provider fallbacks for implementation, documentation synthesis, or a strict documentation-versus-code blind check.
defaultPrompt: Use Arbiter Forge to produce and validate the smallest sufficient hard-arbiter task for my objective.
